query:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

final_prompt.prompt:
9:16的图片比例，生成一张抖音直播的截图，里面是神仙姐姐在直播
神仙姐姐手里掌着牌子，牌子里写着今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！

Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a Douyin (TikTok China) live-stream featuring the actress known as 神仙姐姐 (Liu Yifei).

Style/medium: photorealistic mobile screenshot, mimicking an authentic Douyin live-stream UI with on-screen overlays, comment scrolling bar, viewer count, and live badge
Composition: 9:16 vertical full-screen framing, subject centered in mid-shot, front-facing camera angle, shallow background depth
Subject: a beautiful young Chinese woman resembling 神仙姐姐, holding up a handwritten sign with both hands at chest level; warm, natural makeup, long dark hair, expressive and welcoming expression
Scene/backdrop: softly lit indoor live-stream setup, blurred neutral background suggesting a cozy room or studio
Lighting/mood: soft ring-light frontal illumination, warm and flattering color temperature, bright and cheerful mood
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft neutral background, Douyin UI elements in white and red accent
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" displayed on the sign held by the subject; Douyin live-stream UI overlay text in Chinese
Constraints: sign text must be clearly legible; Douyin live-stream UI chrome (top viewer count, bottom comment bar, red "直播中" badge) must be visible and authentic-looking
Avoid: blurry or illegible sign text, deformed hands, extra fingers, generic beauty filter over-smoothing, watermark artifacts

format_runs.format_label: F9 任务句 + 字段表(中)

final_prompt.prompt:
为"神仙姐姐"直播场景生成一张抖音直播界面截图，9:16 竖屏比例，模拟真实直播画面。

风格/介质:手机截图风格，模拟抖音 App 直播界面 UI，写实摄影质感，带直播间常见的弹幕、点赞、礼物等叠加元素
构图:竖屏 9:16，主播居中偏下，镜头正对人物，类似手机前置摄像头视角，上方留出直播 UI 顶栏空间
主体:神仙姐姐（刘亦菲气质的东方美女，长发飘逸，妆容精致清冷，气质仙气飘飘），双手捧举一块白色手写牌子，牌子正对镜头，牌子上清晰写着"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
场景/背景:室内直播间，背景柔和虚化，暖色调灯光，营造温馨直播氛围
光线/氛围:环形补光灯正面打光，肤色通透，整体氛围温暖亲切
色彩搭配:主播肤色暖白为视觉中心，背景暖色虚化，抖音 UI 元素保持黑白红品牌色调
文字(原文保留):"今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
约束:牌子上的文字必须清晰可读，抖音直播界面 UI 元素（顶部用户名、底部评论栏、点赞心形动画、礼物提示）需真实还原
避免:模糊文字、变形人脸、多余手指、失真比例、廉价绿幕背景、过度磨皮

final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: vertical screenshot mockup, 9:16 TikTok (Douyin) live stream interface
Primary request: a realistic Douyin live stream screenshot featuring a beautiful Chinese actress known as "神仙姐姐" (Liu Yifei lookalike) holding a handwritten sign during a live broadcast
Scene/backdrop: indoor live streaming setup, soft studio lighting, blurred background with subtle ring light glow
Subject: elegant young Chinese woman resembling "神仙姐姐", holding a sign with both hands, warm smile, natural makeup, long black hair
Style/medium: photorealistic screenshot, mobile UI overlay, candid live stream capture
Composition/framing: vertical 9:16 portrait, medium shot from waist up, front-facing camera angle
Lighting/mood: soft warm ring light, bright and welcoming, cheerful live stream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones, soft pink and white background, Douyin red/pink UI accents
Materials/textures: realistic skin texture, paper sign with handwritten-style text, casual indoor fabric
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: include Douyin-style live stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, comment bar, red hearts floating, top bar with live indicator); the sign must display the verbatim Chinese text clearly and legibly; subject must be holding the sign prominently in frame
Avoid: blurry or illegible text on sign, distorted hands or fingers, generic Western streaming UI, watermark
